name: Pineapple Carob Cashew Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, carob powder, baking powder, and salt.
Blend honey or apple juice, applesauce, unsweetened pineapple, and vanilla in a separate bowl.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir in the cashew pieces. Pour batter into an oiled 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
Bake for 1 hour or until brownies pull away from sides of pan.
